name: Drone Hero
short_description: Feel like the world's best drone pilot! Designed for VR but also supports a regular screen with keyboard/gamepad.
detailed_description:
• Feel like the world's best drone pilot.
  • People say they love the steering.
  • 25 challenges with increasing difficulty.
  • Local pass-and-play multiplayer, great for parties.
  • Designed for VR but can also be played on a regular screen with keyboard or gamepad.

CREATED WITH LOVE BY NEUSTON

Neuston is a game studio that focuses on creating super-tight action games.

SEIZURE WARNING

A small percentage of people may experience a seizure when exposed to certain visual images, including flashing lights or patterns. Immediately stop playing and consult a doctor if you experience any symptoms.
